tasks.label: Rebuild InfinityFree Zip
tasks.command: if exist infinityfree-upload.zip del /f /q infinityfree-upload.zip && tar.exe -a -cf infinityfree-upload.zip -C infinityfree-upload . && dir infinityfree-upload.zip

tasks.label: Compare HTML Upload Files
tasks.command: $files = Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter *.html | Sort-Object Name; foreach ($file in $files) { $other = Join-Path 'infinityfree-upload' $file.Name; if (-not (Test-Path $other)) { Write-Output ($file.Name + ' MISSING') } elseif ((Get-FileHash $file.FullName).Hash -eq (Get-FileHash $other).Hash) { Write-Output ($file.Name + ' SAME') } else { Write-Output ($file.Name + ' DIFFERENT') } }

tasks.label: Git Status Snapshot
tasks.command: git status --short && echo. && git branch --show-current && echo. && git remote -v

tasks.label: Git Publish Mobile Login Fix
tasks.command: git add script.js server.js && git commit -m "Fix public backend login handling and mobile CORS" && git push origin main

tasks.label: Check Live Login CORS
tasks.command: curl.exe -i -X OPTIONS https://web-production-8d5f42.up.railway.app/api/auth/login -H "Origin: http://putroeshop.infinityfree.me" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST" && echo. && curl.exe -i -X OPTIONS https://web-production-8d5f42.up.railway.app/api/auth/login -H "Origin: https://putroeshop.infinityfree.me" -H "Access-Control-Request-Method: POST"
